name: 回归基本功
effect: 获得提升过的技能伤害、治疗效果、护盾和技能急速，但你不能使用你的终极技能。

name: 史上最大雪球
effect: 你的雪球获得100技能急速。你的雪球现在变得非常大，并且可以穿过小兵。它会减速， 击飞英雄，并造成额外伤害。如果你没有雪球，则获得一个雪球。

name: 利刃华尔兹
effect: 获得利刃华尔兹作为一个召唤师技能。

name: 你摸不到
effect: 施放你的终极技能会使你进入短时间的免疫伤害状态。

name: 连锁反应
effect: 如果一个被【?】技能击退的目标命中了另一个英雄，则二者都会被击飞并受到伤害。在与地形产生碰撞时，该击飞时长会延长并且他们会受到额外伤害。

name: 死亡之环
effect: 治疗效果和生命回复效果还会对相距最近的那个敌方英雄造成魔法伤害。

name: 小丑学院
effect: 获得召唤师技能欺诈魔术。获得背刺被动。在你阵亡时，生成一个爆炸盒子来对附近的敌人们造成大量真实伤害和恐惧。

name: 巨像的勇气
effect: 定身或缚地一个敌方英雄后获得?护盾值。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants a shield for 3 seconds that absorbs 150 to 450 (+ 4% maximum health) damage (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Shields can stack between multiple triggers of this effect, though not refreshing the duration of previous shields.

name: 残忍
effect: 定身或缚地一个英雄时，召唤一颗会在短暂延迟后着陆的彗星，对附近的敌人们造成魔法伤害。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion summons a comet above them that lands at their current location after 1 second, dealing 50 to 150 (+ 40% AP) (+ 4% of your maximum health) magic damage to enemies within the area (6 second cooldown per target per cast instance).

name: 全凭身法
effect: 你的冲刺、跳跃、闪烁或传送类技能获得175技能急速。

name: 你肩上的恶魔
effect: 与【大魔王】本尊签订一个契约。他持续汲取你的生命力，但回报给你力量，让你对英雄造成额外真实伤害并且创造治疗残片供你获取。

name: 位面转移
effect: 获得当黑暗到来召唤师技能。生成一个地带来将它其中的所有人传送到另一个位面。

name: 亮出你的剑
effect: 变为近战状态，并且获得攻击力、生命值、攻击速度、生命偷取和移动速度 (每个属性都基于舍弃的攻击距离而进一步提升)。
effect_en: Become melee, modifying your attack range to 200 (+ 100% bonus attack range from augments) units. Additionally, gain 30% bonus attack damage, 25% bonus attack speed, 30% bonus health, 25% bonus movement speed, and 20% life steal. These bonuses are increased by type=champion's default attack range. This augment is only available for ranged champions.

name: 空投熊
effect: 阵亡时，一个具有你所有强化符文的巨大提伯斯从天而降并伤害附近的敌人们。

name: 飞身踢
effect: 你的攻击会处决低生命值的敌方英雄，从而击退并引发一次爆炸，同时治疗你自身。

name: 卡皮巴拉空投
effect: 获得卡皮巴拉空投作为一个召唤师技能。在一阵延迟后，召唤一个卡皮巴拉落下，造成30%最大生命值的真实伤害。

name: 双刀流
effect: 在攻击时，发射一个箭矢，它施加效能削减的攻击特效。获得10%总攻击速度。
effect_en: Your basic attacks launch a bolt at the target that fires after a Estimated on-attack, deals 40% of the triggering attack's Damage calculated before modifiers damage, and applies on-hit effects at 40% effectiveness. Additionally, increase your total attack speed by 10%.

name: 大地苏醒
effect: 你的冲刺、闪烁或传送类技能会留下一条在0.75秒后爆炸的轨迹。

name: 吃过路兵
effect: 周期性地识别出敌方英雄身上的破绽。 用攻击或技能命中它们时，会造成最大生命值真实伤害、回复生命值并提供移动速度。这些效果可以叠加。

name: 回响施放
effect: 施放你的【?】技能时会朝你的鼠标位置派出一个复制体并再次施放该技能。

name: 信念者的强化
effect: 为友军提供治疗或护盾会赐福他们，使其伤害填充你的虔诚。当你拥有足够的虔诚时，释放一道冲击波来造成魔法伤害并处决低生命值的敌人们。
effect_en: Granting a heal or shield to an allied champion blesses them for 8 seconds. Whenever a blessed ally damages an enemy champion, you generate a stack of Devotion, stacking up to 50 times. Upon reaching maximum stacks, you unleash a shockwave that deals 50 to 300 (+ 750% heal and shield power) magic damage to nearby enemies. Enemy champions damaged below a percentage of their maximum health equal to 25% of your heal and shield power are executed.

name: 至高天诺言
effect: 获得15%治疗和护盾强度。获得至高天诺言作为一个召唤师技能。警惕传送至你的友军并在着陆时提供持续3秒的?护盾值。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Empyrean Promise Vigilance active. Additionally, gain 15% heal and shield power. Active - Vigilance: After a 0.25-second delay, dash to the current location of the target allied champion and gain a 100 to 250 (+ 100% AP) (+ 10% bonus health) shield for 3 seconds. Upon arrival, grant the ally the same shield (20 second cooldown; 2000 range).

name: 尤里卡
effect: 获得相当于30%法术强度的技能急速。
effect_en: Gain ability haste equal to 30% AP.

name: 连拨击锤
effect: 对敌方英雄的攻击会发射5个额外飞弹，造成随距离提升的额外伤害。每个方向的冷却时间独立计算。

name: 精怪魔法
effect: 你的终极技能的伤害会对敌人造成持续若干秒的变形效果。
effect_en: Damaging enemies with your ultimate ability polymorphs them into harmless critters for 2 seconds, during which their base movement speed is reduced by 60, and disarms them for the same duration (15 second cooldown per target).

name: 最终形态
effect: 在施放你的终极技能时，获得持续10秒的最大生命值护盾、全能吸血和移动速度。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability empowers you for 10 seconds, causing you to gain a shield for 50% of your maximum health, 20% omnivamp, and 30% bonus movement speed for the duration (20 second cooldown).

name: 巨人杀手
effect: 体型变小，获得移动速度，并基于敌方英雄体型大于你的程度获得额外伤害。
effect_en: Become tiny, reducing your size by 75% and granting you 20% bonus movement speed. Additionally, deal type=target's size bonus damage against enemy champions with greater size than you.

name: 玻璃大炮
effect: 减少30%最大生命值。造成额外的15%真实伤害。
effect_en: You gain a health threshold equal to 70% maximum health which cannot be By increases or decreases to maximum health nor By healing and health regeneration by any means. In return, you deal bonus true damage equal to 15% of all of the damage you deal Damage calculated before modifiers.

name: 夺金
effect: 用攻击或技能对一个英雄造成伤害时会造成额外魔法伤害，并为你提供金币和 移动速度。
effect_en: Damaging basic attacks or abilities against enemy champions deal 50 to 150 (+ 40% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) bonus magic damage, and grant you 30 gold and 25% bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds (30 second cooldown per champion).

name: 歌利亚巨人
effect: 体型变大，获得35%生命值和15%适应之力。

name: 男爵之手
effect: 获得25%适应之力。附近友方小兵都获得极大增强。
effect_en: Gain a modified Hand of Baron, which only grants 25% increased adaptive force and greatly empowers nearby allied minions.

name: 濒死悟道
effect: 用攻击或技能伤害敌方英雄时会提供层数。在满层时，你在阵亡时会进行强化复活。

name: 掷骰狂人
effect: 附近敌人在阵亡时有几率掉落【属性锻造器】。

name: 神圣雪球
effect: 雪球获得100技能急速。你在用【雪球】冲刺后短暂免疫伤害。如果你没有雪球，获得一个雪球。
effect_en: After using the Dash spell from Mark, you become invulnerable for 1.5 seconds upon arrival. Additionally, your Mark cooldown is reduced equivalent to 100 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark.

name: 艾卡西亚的陷落
effect: 即刻：获得1个【斑比的熔渣】。任务：持有日炎圣盾和璀璨回响。奖励：将这些装备合成为虚空献祭。

name: 炼狱导管
effect: 你的技能会施加一层可叠加的灼烧，持续造成魔法伤害。你的灼烧效果会降低你各基础技能的冷却时间。
effect_en: Your ability hits against champions apply a Burn for 3 seconds that dealscolor=magic damage (+ 4.6% bonus AD) (+ 6/3% AP) bonus magic damage per second color=magic damage (+ 14% bonus AD) (+ 6% AP) bonus magic damage over the duration(1 second cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. Additionally, all of your Burn effects reduce the cooldowns of all your basic abilities by 0.08 seconds for each tick of damage they deal to a target.

name: 无限循环往复
effect: 获得60技能急速，外加每次参与击杀3技能急速。
effect_en: Gain 60 ability haste, increased by 3 each time you score a champion takedown.

name: 珠光护手
effect: 你的技能可以造成暴击。获得 ?暴击几率。

name: 尊我为王
effect: 当你第一次携带一件传说级装备并乘坐敌人的传送门时，你会加冕为王，升级你的装备并获得一个随机棱彩阶强化符文。
effect_en: Upon entering the enemy team's gate or Catapult for the first time, either of which are located near their spawn, you become Kinged, causing you to gain one random Prismatic-tier augment and the first eligible Legendary item in your inventory to be upgraded with improved stats. The gold value of all Includes AH, AP, AD, AS, AR, MR, and HP on the item is increased by exactly 1000 gold. King Me prioritize upgrading the first Legendary item eligible for a upgrade based on its position in the inventory, detecting each slot until an eligible item is found.

name: 科学狂人
effect: 每次重生时，你的体型要么变大(获得适应之力和生命值)，要么变小(获得技能急速和移动速度)。
effect_en: Upon acquiring this augment and each time you respawn, gain either 30% adaptive force, 20% bonus health, and 40% increased size or 70 ability haste, 40% bonus movement speed, and 40% reduced size.

name: 物法皆修
effect: 你的每次攻击为你提供可叠加的法术强度，并且你的每次技能在伤害敌人时为你提供可叠加的攻击力。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit grant 6 to 18 ability power and damaging abilities once per cast instance grant 3 to 9 bonus attack damage, lasting for 5 seconds, with the duration of both refreshing on subsequent hits, and stacking infinitely.

name: 多重射击
effect: 任务：用【?】技能命中敌方英雄?次。奖励：发射数量基于任务等级的额外飞弹。

name: 秘术冲拳
effect: 攻击特效使你的各个技能的冷却时间缩减1.25秒。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit reduce the remaining cooldowns of your abilities by 1.25 seconds.

name: 不祥契约
effect: 基于已损失生命值，获得法术强度、移动速度和全能吸血，每次你施放技能时会对自身造成伤害。
effect_en: Your abilities now have a health cost of 5% current health to cast them. In return, you gain ability power based on your missing health, up to 75 to 150 at 70% missing health, key1=% bonus movement speed, and key1=% omnivamp.

name: 全能龙魂
effect: 获得3个随机龙魂。
effect_en: Grants 3 random Dragon Soul.

name: 超负荷
effect: 使用另一个技能会重置【?】技能的冷却时间。

name: 潘朵拉的盒子
effect: 将你的所有强化符文变为随机的棱彩阶强化符文。

name: 针插垫
effect: 在【?】技能期间进行攻击会施加标记，其会在该持续时长结束时爆炸，从而造成伤害并提供移动速度。

name: 魄罗蛮冲
effect: 任务：收集【魄罗佳肴】并投喂?只魄罗奖励：获得【魄罗冲锋】召唤师技能，可让魄罗们对敌方队伍发动几波攻势。每任务等级都会解锁额外的波次。“噢吼！它们可真萌啊！”——魄罗驯养人

name: 舞会女王
effect: 每35秒，自动施放一道闪亮宝冠降临在你头上。当它着陆时，获得洛的终极技能，魅惑你碰到的敌人们。
effect_en: Automatically cast a modified version of The Quickness Rakan, empowering you to break into a captivating sprint for 6 seconds. While empowered, you gain ghosting and 50% bonus movement speed, and enemies you 300 unit collision radius are knocked down and become charmed for 1.5 seconds (35 second cooldown). A sparkly tiara will descend upon you 2.5 seconds before the effect activates.

name: 蛋白粉奶昔
effect: 获得?%治疗和护盾强度，基于额外护甲和魔抗。
effect_en: Gain 25% (+ 35% per 100 bonus armor) (+ 35% per 100 bonus magic resistance) heal and shield power.

name: 量子计算
effect: 周期性地自动施放一次巨型斩击。被击中的敌人会被减速，受到额外最大生命值伤害，并且治疗你。

name: 任务：海牛阿福的勇士
effect: 任务：参与击杀?次。奖励：金铲铲
effect_en: Quest: Score 18 champion takedowns. Reward: Upon completing your Quest:, you receive The Golden Spatula. If your inventory is full at the time of quest completion, the item will be granted as soon as a slot in the inventory is available.

name: 任务：沃格勒特的巫师帽
effect: 立刻获得一个无用大棒。任务：持有灭世者的死亡之帽和中娅沙漏。奖励：获得沃格勒特的巫师帽。
effect_en: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod. Quest: Obtain Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass. Reward: Upon completing your Quest:, convert the items you obtained for the quest into Wooglet's Witchcap.

name: 快步
effect: 当你使用【?】技能时，朝你的鼠标指针进行冲刺。

name: 飞升仪式
effect: 参与击杀敌方英雄后会留下其精华。攻击该精华会提供移动速度并重置基础技能冷却时间。

name: 最万用的瞄准镜
effect: 获得?攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 250 bonus attack range.

name: 大招工具人
effect: 你的技能急速仅作用于终极技能，但效果多50%。获得100技能急速。

name: 王中王，靴中靴
effect: 即刻：随机获得一双升级后的靴子。需求：完成其任务，以更换为另一双。奖励：嘉文一世之靴

name: 咒语裂变
effect: 在命中时、最大距离时或再次施放时，你的【?】技能的飞弹会分裂为两部分。

name: 灵魄炸弹
effect: 为友方英雄提供治疗和护盾时会为你积攒一颗【灵魄炸弹】。在满层时，投掷该炸弹至生命值最低的那个友军，从而对其和附近友军们提供治疗和护盾。

name: 软弹啪叽抓
effect: 偶尔对所有附近的敌方英雄放出软弹啪叽的手，然后用灵链系住。你的下次攻击将拉拽所有被系住的敌人。

name: 属性叠属性叠属性！
effect: 获得4个【属性锻造器】，有更高几率出现黄金阶和棱彩阶锻造器！在你的下一次强化符文选取时，每个栏位获得一次额外的刷新。
effect_en: Gain 4 Stat Bonus, with a higher chance of obtaining Gold and Prismatic tier anvils. Additionally, on the next round of augment selection, you gain an additional reroll per augment slot.

name: 和我一起困在这里
effect: 使用你的终极技能时会嘲讽附近的敌人们并提供给你伤害减免。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability grants you an aura for 2 seconds, growing in size over the duration to up to 500 units. After the duration, you taunt all enemies within the aura for 2 seconds and gain 50% damage reduction for the same duration (30 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste. Aura is activated once the ultimate's effect For instant-cast spells or has For duration-based spells.

name: 电涌力场
effect: 在施放终极技能时，在你周围生成一个地带来提供技能急速和移动速度。在其中时，它会发射飞弹，飞弹造成相当于你造成的20%伤害。

name: 战争交响乐
effect: 获得致命节奏和征服者基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Conqueror and Lethal Tempo keystone runes.

name: 踢踏舞
effect: 你的攻击会为你提供移动速度。基于你的移动速度获得攻击速度。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit against enemy champions and minions grant 10 bonus movement speed, lasting for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent triggers, and stacking infinitely. Additionally, gain bonus attack speed equal to 10% total movement speed.

name: 泰坦的坚决
effect: 在承受或造成伤害时获得层数。每10层，获得适应之力、护甲、魔法抗性、体型和韧性。

name: 质变：混沌
effect: 获得2个随机强化符文。
effect_en: Gain two completely random augments, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

name: 扳机炼狱
effect: 获得悍勇本色。在你达到S评价等级时，自动使用炼狱扳机。
effect_en: Your damaging basic attacks and abilities against at least one enemy champion unique from the previous damaging hit made against champions generate a stack of Style for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent unique or non-unique hits and stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, gain 1 to 16 bonus movement speed, up to a maximum of 1 to 16. Upon reaching maximum Style stacks, you unleash a torrent of shots for 2.25, during which you rapidly shoot at nearby enemies over 2 at sporadic times in on average; total of 5 intervals of 0.231 and 5 of 0.198 seconds each (up to 10 times per enemy), dealing 20 to 40 (+ 40% AD) (+ 25% AP) physical damage with each shot, reduced by 75% against minions. Enemies below 30% of their maximum health are critically struck fordouble damage 20*2 to 40*2 (+ 40*2% AD) (+ 25*2% AP) physical damage(15 second cooldown). This effect ends prematurely if you become affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control. Shot damage applies life steal. Style stacks are consumed at the end of the shooting effect.

name: 三重射击
effect: 你的【?】技能会瞄准你前方2个额外的敌人。

name: 终极唤醒
effect: 获得30终极技能急速。在施放你的终极技能后，刷新你的所有基础技能并获得持续15秒的300基础技能急速。(20秒冷却时间)
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability resets the cooldowns of all your basic abilities and grants you 300 basic ability haste for 15 seconds (20 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste.

name: 终极刷
effect: 在施放终极技能后刷新你的终极技能(75秒冷却时间或阵亡时重置)。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability resets its cooldown once its effect For instant-cast spells or has For duration-based spells (75 second cooldown, reset upon death).

name: 升级：花晓之剑
effect: 获得100%攻击速度。你对英雄的攻击会使来自【花晓之剑】的治疗效果提升250%。

name: 风语者的祝福
effect: 你的治疗效果和护盾效果还会提升目标的护甲和魔法抗性，这些加成持续3秒。
effect_en: Your or allies' heals and shields on yourself, or your heals and shields on allies, grant the target 30 to 60 bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 3 seconds.

name: 全心为你
effect: 你的治疗和护盾在用在一个友军身上时会变强。

name: 尖端发明家
effect: 获得100装备急速(相当于50%装备冷却缩减)。装备急速可缩减所有装备技能的冷却时间。
effect_en: Grants 100 item haste, which is equivalent to 50% cooldown reduction for items.

name: 大法师
effect: 施放一个技能会返还另一个随机技能的花费，数额相当于30%原技能冷却时间。

name: 邦！
effect: 被【?】技能强化的攻击或技能会对目标和附近的敌人们造成额外伤害。

name: 超强大脑
effect: 每拥有1法术强度就会获得3护盾值。阵亡时或耗尽后70秒重置。

name: 面包和黄油
effect: 你的【?】技能获得100技能急速。

name: 面包和奶酪
effect: 你的【?】技能获得100技能急速。
effect_en: Your champion's third basic ability (E) gains 100 ability haste.

name: 面包和果酱
effect: 你的【?】技能获得100技能急速。
effect_en: Your champion's second basic ability (W) gains 100 ability haste.

name: 生机迸发
effect: 获得生机迸发作为一个召唤师技能。生机迸发会猛然提升你的体型，击飞附近的敌人们并提供最大生命值。

name: 藏身草丛
effect: 在进入草丛后，多造成20%伤害，持续2秒。留在草丛中会刷新这个效果。

name: 星界躯体
effect: 获得1500生命值，但你造成的伤害降低10%。

name: 燃烧利息
effect: 施加至英雄的灼烧和持续伤害会生成金币。

name: 会心治疗
effect: 你的治疗和护盾可以暴击，造成40%额外数额的效果。获得 25%暴击几率。

name: 暴击飞弹
effect: 当你暴击时，发射飞弹造成魔法伤害。获得 25%暴击几率。

name: 暴击律动
effect: 你的普攻在暴击时获得可叠加的攻击速度。获得 25%暴击几率。

name: 关键暴击
effect: 获得50%暴击几率。

name: 黎明使者的坚决
effect: 在跌到50%生命值以下时，在3秒里持续回复共30%最大生命值。阵亡时或每45秒重置。
effect_en: Upon dropping below 50% maximum health, you are healed for 30% maximum health over 3 seconds (45 second cooldown, reset upon death).

name: 神圣干预
effect: 战斗开始后的短时间内，召唤一颗护体星星。在它着陆时，你和附近的友军们进入持续若干秒的免疫伤害状态。随后每35秒自动施放这个效果。
effect_en: Automatically cast Cosmic Radiance Taric, calling down a protective star upon you that descends over 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, you and all allied champions within icononly=true 400 units become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds (35 second cooldown).

name: 捐赠
effect: 获得1750金币。无需多问。
effect_en: Gain 1750 gold upon acquiring this augment.

name: 双发快射
effect: 你的暴击施加一次额外的附带攻击特效。获得 ?暴击几率。

name: 无尽大杀四方
effect: 在战斗状态下，自动施放一次环形斧头挥舞从而造成物理伤害。被斧刃命中的敌人们受到额外伤害并治疗你。

name: 虚幻武器
effect: 你的技能可施加攻击特效。每个目标有1秒冷却时间。
effect_en: Your abilities apply on-hit effects (1 second cooldown per target).

name: 火上浇油
effect: 你的攻击会施加一个可无限叠加的灼烧攻击特效，持续造成伤害。
effect_en: Basic attacks apply a Burn for 5 seconds that deals bonus magic damage equal to2/5% of the target's maximum health per second. 2% of the target's maximum health over the duration.This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

name: 闪现向前
effect: 你的闪现有3层充能。在120秒后，再次获得所有充能。

name: 有始有终
effect: 获得先攻和黑暗收割基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Dark Harvest and First Strike keystone runes.

name: 狙神飞星
effect: 任务：用技能狙击?个敌方英雄奖励：一颗流星会飞向被狙击的敌方英雄，在其周围的一个区域内造成魔法伤害

name: 罪恶快感
effect: 参与击杀后，在4秒内提升移动速度和攻击速度。

name: 贪欲束缚
effect: 用你的【?】技能定身或缚地敌方英雄时造成额外伤害并对你进行治疗。

name: 冰雪爆裂
effect: 再次施放雪球会造成提升伤害、击飞该目标、并击退附近的敌人们。

name: 不动如山
effect: 获余震和冰川增幅基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Aftershock and Glacial Augment keystone runes.

name: 杀戮时间到了
effect: 在施放你的终极技能后，标记所有敌人并存储你对他们造成的伤害。当它结束时，引爆该伤害。
effect_en: Upon casting your ultimate ability, you apply Death Mark Zed to all enemy champions (8 second cooldown). The mark stores 40% of all Damage calculated before modifiers damage you deal to the affected target, detonating after 5 seconds to deal true damage equal to the damage stored against them.

name: 最终都市列车
effect: 在你阵亡时，朝击杀你的敌人发动一辆列车，对它命中的每个敌人造成?物理伤害。这个列车不会停下。

name: 小小的额外帮助
effect: 在你的【?】技能持续期间获得?攻击距离和?攻击速度。

name: 魔法飞弹
effect: 造成技能伤害会对其发射3个飞弹，每个造成基于飞行距离的百分比最大生命值的真实伤害。
effect_en: Dealing damage to an enemy champion with an ability fires 3 Firecrackers at them that each deal true damage equal to 0.33% of the target's maximum health, increased to up to 1% based on distance travelled (maximum damage reached at 1000 units). This effect can only trigger once every 6 seconds from the same cast.

name: 神射法师
effect: 你的攻击造成相当于你75%法术强度的额外物理伤害。
effect_en: Basic attacks deal bonus physical damage equal to 75% AP.

name: 仁慈打击
effect: 在使用【?】技能之后，你的下一次普攻获得攻击距离、攻击速度并造成额外最大生命值魔法伤害。

name: 仆从大师
effect: 你的召唤物获得40%体型提升、生命值和伤害。
effect_en: Your pets deal 40% increased damage as well as gain 40% bonus health and size.

name: 自然即是治愈
effect: 站在草丛中时，每秒回复?最大生命值。

name: 夜狩
effect: 在对敌人造成伤害的3秒内参与击杀该敌人会使你进入隐身状态。
effect_en: Scoring a takedown against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them renders you invisible for 1.5 seconds. Attacking or casting abilites ends the stealth immediately.

name: 回力OK镖
effect: 每?秒朝着一个附近的敌人自动施放投掷一个回力镖。
effect_en: Automatically cast an improved version of Boomerang Blade Sivir at the closest nearby enemy champion within 1250 units, dealing 40 to 200 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) adaptive damage to enemies hit (10 second cooldown).

name: 哎哟，我的硬币！
effect: 在参与击杀敌方英雄后，该英雄会在附近掉落多枚硬币，你和友军可以收集它们。每枚硬币价值10金币。

name: 我们的治疗
effect: 每当你周围的某人进行治疗时，你获得相当于其15%治疗效果的治疗效果。从敌方治疗中获得双倍。

name: 狂徒豪气
effect: 在使用一次冲刺、闪烁或传送之后，你获得12护甲和魔法抗性，这个效果至多可叠加至5层。
effect_en: Dashing or blinking grants 12 bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 15 seconds, stacking up to 5 times for a total of 60 bonus resistances, and refreshing on subsequent triggers.

name: 过量延伸者
effect: 回城并进入到你的加农炮发射器。它的距离、飞行速度和伤害已经得到显著提升。

name: 溢流
effect: 你的法力消耗翻倍。你的技能的治疗效果、护盾效果和伤害获得提升，提升幅度基于你的最大法力值。
effect_en: Your abilities' mana costs are doubled, but you also gain 10% (+ 0.5% per 100 maximum mana) increased damage as well as self and outgoing healing and shielding.

name: 轻拍背部
effect: 友军会在你走过时鼓励你，为你提供护盾和移动速度。

name: 超凡邪恶
effect: 在你用技能对敌人造成伤害时永久获得1法术强度。如果是作为你的第二个强化符文，则自带40法术强度。
effect_en: Gain Phenomenal Evil Power Veigar. Phenomenal Evil Power: Generate a permanent stack of Phenomenal Evil each time you damage an enemy champion with ability damage. This effect cannot trigger more than once every second globally and once every 3 seconds from the same cast instance. For each stack, gain 1 ability power. If this is not your first augment, start with 40 Phenomenal Evil stacks, granting you 40 ability power.

name: 弹球
effect: 你的雪球获得技能急速并且造成额外的真实伤害。当雪球从墙体上反弹时，它的体型和伤害获得提升，并缩短它的冷却时间。
effect_en: Your Mark is empowered to instead throw a pinball, which deals 100 to 500 bonus true damage and ricochets off of terrain that it collides with. Each time the pinball ricochets, its remaining travel distance is reset, it increases in radius by 25%, deals 20% increased damage, and reduces Mark remaining cooldown by 30%. The pinball can ricochet up to 4 times, for a maximum radius increase of 100% and a damage increase of 80%. Additionally, your Mark cooldown is reduced equivalent to 50 ability haste. If Mark is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Mark.

name: 豪猪
effect: 承受来自英雄的伤害会积攒一次尖针迸发，这些尖针会从你身上飞出，对附近的敌人们造成伤害和减速。

name: 高压锅
effect: 每一秒，对附近的敌方英雄们施加一层可叠加的灼烧，这个效果受益于你的最大生命值。任务：对敌方英雄造成灼烧伤害奖励：提升【高压锅】的规模和伤害，基于任务等级。

name: 急速之追求
effect: 任务：用【?】技能命中敌方英雄?次奖励：【?】技能获得技能急速，基于任务等级，至多至?。

name: 威能之追求
effect: 任务：用【?】技能命中敌人?次。奖励：永久提升【?】技能伤害。

name: 任务：钢化你心
effect: 任务：持有【心之钢】且层数在300层或以上。奖励：将你的【心之钢】层数乘以3。
effect_en: Quest: Obtain Heartsteel and accumulate over 300 bonus health from Colossal Consumption. Reward: Upon completing your Quest:, increase the bonus health gained from Heartsteel Colossal Consumption by 200%.

name: 循环往复
effect: 获得60技能急速。
effect_en: Grants 60 ability haste.

name: 装填
effect: 在【?】技能期间的普攻攻击特效会降低其冷却时间。

name: 复位
effect: 再次施放【?】技能时会产生爆炸，并回到你的原本位置。

name: 更万用的瞄准镜
effect: 获得?攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 200 bonus attack range.

name: 炽烈黎明
effect: 你的技能会标记敌人，使其在被你的友军的下一个攻击或技能命中时会受到额外魔法伤害。
effect_en: Gain Sunlight Leona. Sunlight: Your damaging abilities mark enemies, causing them to take 40 to 200 bonus magic damage from your ally's next basic attack or ability hit against them (0.75-second cooldown per target).

name: 鲨鱼诱饵
effect: 在阵亡之后的若干秒，一头鲨鱼会啃噬所有附近的敌人们。你可以在阵亡后进行移动，以给鲨鱼攻击进行定位。

name: 鲨鱼暴风
effect: 鲨鱼们环绕着你的【雪球】，对附近的敌人们造成伤害和减速。当你的【雪球】命中一个英雄时，其会陷入一阵鲨鱼风暴之中！

name: 缩小引擎
effect: 参与击杀后会让你变小并且获得技能急速和移动速度。阵亡时损失65%层数。
effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, gain 8 ability haste and 1% bonus movement speed, and reduce your size by 4%. Lose 65% of stacks on death. Size reduction is capped at 80% (20 stacks).

name: 缩小射线
effect: 你的攻击会将目标的伤害与体型削减15%攻击特效。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit reduce the target's damage dealt by 15% for 3 seconds, refreshing with each hit. Their size is also reduced significantly for the duration.

name: 老练狙神
effect: 用一个非终极技能狙击一个敌人时，返还该技能80%冷却时间(周期性技能返还65%)。
effect_en: Hitting an enemy champion with a basic ability while located at least icononly=true 700 units away from them at the time of the hit reduces its current cooldown by 80% of its total cooldown, modified to 65% for damage over time abilities.

name: 咏叹奏鸣
effect: 每10秒，以一个不断交替的旋律来自动施放坚毅咏叹调和迅捷奏鸣曲。坚毅咏叹调治疗附近友军并提供一个临时的护盾光环。迅捷奏鸣曲提供一个临时光环来提供额外移动速度。
effect_en: Alternate between automatically casting a modified version of Aria of Perseverance Sona and modified Song of Celerity Sona, with the former being cast first (10 second cooldown). Aria of Perseverance: Heal yourself for 60 (+ 60% AP) and send out a tone to the Based on greatest % missing health allied champion within 1000 units that heals them for the same amount. Additionally, generate an 400 unit radius, center-to-edge that grants you and tagged allied champions a 80 (+ 40% AP) shield for 1.5 seconds. Song of Celerity: Gain 30% bonus movement speed for 7 seconds. If you take damage during this time, the duration ends prematurely once or if 3 seconds have elapsed. Additionally, generate an 400 unit radius, center-to-edge that grants tagged allied champions 20% bonus movement speed for 3 seconds.

name: 吞噬灵魂
effect: 定身一个敌方英雄时会提供20最大生命值。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants you 20 bonus health, stacking infinitely (5 second cooldown per cast instance).

name: 虹吸
effect: 用【?】技能伤害敌方英雄时会治疗你。
effect_en: Heal for 12% of the Damage calculated after modifiers dealt by your critical strikes. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

name: 灵魂虹吸
effect: 暴击造成伤害的12%会等额治疗你自身。获得 25%暴击几率。

name: 心灵净化
effect: 参与击杀时，产生一次爆炸，对附近其它敌人们造成60%减速，并且造成基于他们当前生命值的伤害。
effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown causes the area around the slain champion to explode in a 500 unit radius, dealing adaptive damage to enemies within equal to 15% of their current health and leaving behind a zone for 1.5 seconds that slows enemies within by 60%.

name: 属性叠属性！
effect: 获得3个【属性锻造器】，有更高几率出现黄金阶和棱彩阶锻造器！
effect_en: Gain 3 Stat Bonus, with a higher chance of obtaining Gold and Prismatic tier anvils.

name: 顺手牵羊
effect: 击杀时从敌方英雄偷取一件随机装备。

name: 风暴涌动
effect: 靠近友方英雄时获得移动速度。

name: 坦克引擎
effect: 参与击杀时，获得一个层数，使你的体型增大并提升最大生命值。阵亡时损失层数。
effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, increase your maximum health and size by 5%. Lose 65% of stacks on death.

name: 坚韧
effect: 获得巨幅提升的生命回复，这个数额会在低生命值时进一步提升。

name: 地形专家
effect: 你的【?】技能会在它周围的一个区域内造成伤害。

name: 惊惧
effect: 每当你施放【?】技能时，恐惧你周围的敌人们.

name: 穿针引线
effect: 获得18%护甲穿透和法术穿透。
effect_en: Grants 18% armor penetration and magic penetration.

name: 牙仙子
effect: 爆裂敌人会掉落牙齿。拾取牙齿会提供给你永久的穿甲和法术穿透。

name: 质变：棱彩阶
effect: 获得1个随机棱彩阶强化符文。
effect_en: Gain one random Prismatic augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

name: 升级：无尽之刃
effect: 获得25% 暴击几率和500金币。装备无尽之刃后，可使你的暴击几率在每次攻击都会提供随机的暴击伤害。
effect_en: Upgrades Infinity Edge, empowering it to gain Sword of the Divine Excoriate. Additionally, gain 500 gold and 25% critical strike chance. Excoriate: Gain a random amount of bonus critical strike damage that scales up to 50% of your critical strike chance, with the value of this amount changing every 0.25 seconds.

name: 升级：耀光
effect: 你的咒刃效果造成额外伤害并治疗你自身，治疗量相当于目标生命值的一定百分比。此外，获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades all Spellblade items, empowering the passive effect to deal additional bonus physical damage equal to 4% of the target's maximum health and heal you for 3.5% of your maximum health. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 升级：雪球
effect: 雪球获得50技能急速。击中一个敌人时，会产生一次降雪，来对附近的敌人造成范围伤害和减速效果。如果你没有雪球，获得一个雪球。

name: 吸血习性
effect: 你不再能够被友军治疗或获得生命回复。获得25%全能吸血。

name: 活力焕发
effect: 使用【?】技能时回复生命值。

name: 虚空冲刺
effect: 用【?】技能冲刺时会产生一片【虚空地带】来对敌方英雄们造成减速和魔法伤害。

name: 易损
effect: 你的装备效果和持续伤害效果可以暴击。获得 25%暴击几率。

name: 术士果汁盒
effect: 获得?全能吸血。

name: 喂呜喂呜
effect: 在朝着低生命值的友军移动时，获得移动速度。你的治疗和护盾获得提升，基于你目标的低生命值程度。

name: 急急小子
effect: 获得移动速度，相当于你的70%技能急速。
effect_en: Grants bonus movement speed equal to 70% ability haste.

name: 物理转魔法
effect: 将额外攻击力转化为法术强度。获得15%法术强度。
effect_en: Convert all of your bonus attack damage into ability power at a rate of 1 ability power per 0.6 bonus attack damage. Additionally, increase your ability power by 15%.

name: 自适应防护
effect: 用【?】技能打击一个敌方英雄时，为你提供持续6秒的?护甲或魔法抗性，基于该技能的伤害类型。这个效果可以叠加。

name: 大力
effect: 获得20%攻击力。

name: 会心防御
effect: 你可以使用你的暴击几率(最大50%几率)来进行会心防御，使你有一定几率来使所受伤害降低。获得25%暴击几率。

name: 灵巧
effect: 获得 60%攻击速度。

name: 俯冲轰炸
effect: 在你阵亡时爆炸，造成巨量真实伤害。

name: 唯快不破
effect: 你每比目标多10移动速度，则对其多造成1%额外伤害。

name: 别停止引导
effect: 你每引导一秒都会获得护盾值。

name: 双重打击
effect: 【?】技能施加一次额外的攻击特效。

name: 侵蚀
effect: 对敌人造成伤害时会施加一层持续4秒且可叠加的护甲和魔法抗性击碎效果。

name: 魔法转物理
effect: 将法术强度转化为额外攻击力。获得15%攻击力。
effect_en: Convert all of your ability power into bonus attack damage at a rate of 1 bonus attack damage per 1.66 ability power. Additionally, increase your total attack damage by 15%.

name: 逃跑计划
effect: 在降至35%生命值时，获得巨量持续衰减的护盾、持续衰减的移动速度和持续衰减的缩小效果。
effect_en: Upon dropping below 35% of your maximum health, gain a shield for 65% of your maximum health, 150% bonus movement speed, and reduced size (75 second cooldown). These effects all decay over 5.5 seconds.

name: 火狐
effect: 自动施放获得移动速度并召唤3道烈焰环绕于你，瞄准距离内相距最近的那个可见英雄并造成魔法伤害。
effect_en: Automatically cast a modified version of Fox-Fire Ahri, gaining 25% bonus movement speed that decays over 2 seconds and conjuring 3 flames that orbit you clockwise for up to 2.5 seconds at a radius of icononly=true 150 units. The flames will On a 0.25-second delay after acquisition the nearest visible enemies within icononly=true 550 units, dealing 35 to 160 (+ 25% bonus AD (+ 25% AP) adaptive damage, reduced to35*0.3 to 160*0.3 (+ 25*0.3% bonus AD (+ 25*0.3% AP) 30% of the original damagefor enemies hit by subsequent flames from the same cast (7 second cooldown).

name: 急救用具
effect: 获得20%治疗和护盾强度。

name: 闪闪现现
effect: 获得第二个【闪现】召唤师技能和70召唤师技能急速。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Flash. Additionally, gain 70 summoner spell haste.

name: 闪光弹
effect: 你的【闪现】会引发一次爆炸，造成伤害和减速（阵亡时重置）。
effect_en: Using Flash creates an explosion around the blink location that deals 70 to 240 (+ 70% AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies and slows them by 35% for 1.25 seconds. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets upon your death. If Flash is not equipped, you will be prompted to replace one of your summoner spells with Flash.

name: 渴血
effect: 获得15%全能吸血。

name: 由暴生急
effect: 获得相当于你40%暴击几率的技能急速。

name: 重量级打击手
effect: 你的攻击造成相当于你3.5%最大生命值的额外物理伤害。
effect_en: Basic attacks deal bonus physical damage equal to 3.5% of your maximum health.

name: 海克斯科技龙魂
effect: 周期性地使你的下一个伤害型技能或攻击触发一道闪电爆裂，连锁穿过敌人以造成伤害和减速。
effect_en: Grants the Hextech Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if you aleady have it.

name: 家园卫士
effect: 获得100%移动速度，在受到伤害后失效6秒。

name: 冰寒
effect: 你的减速效果可使移动速度降低额外的75。
effect_en: Your slowing effects reduce the movement speed of targets by an additional 75.

name: 炼狱龙魂
effect: 你获得炼狱龙魂，使用技能或攻击命中敌人时造成额外伤害。
effect_en: Grants the Infernal Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if you aleady have it.

name: 注魔
effect: 攻击特效消耗?法力值以造成?魔法伤害，这个伤害可以暴击。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit against enemy champions consume 2.5% of your maximum mana to deal bonus magic damage equal to 4.5% of your maximum mana. This damage can critically strike for 100 bonus damage.

name: 杀意翻涌
effect: 在朝着低生命值的敌人时，获得额外移动速度。
effect_en: Gain 60% bonus movement speed towards enemy champions below 40% of their maximum health.

name: 练腿日
effect: 获得50移动速度和40%减速抗性。
effect_en: Gain 50 bonus movement speed and 40% slow resist.

name: 点亮他们！
effect: 每第4次攻击发射4个飞弹以造成魔法伤害攻击特效。
effect_en: Basic attacks generate a stack, up to 4. The fourth stack consumes them all to quickly launch 4 Firecrackers at the target that each deal 11 to 80 (+ 35% bonus AD) (+ 19% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit, for a total of 11*4 to 80*4 (+ 35*4% bonus AD) (+ 19*4% AP).

name: 大师铸就
effect: 使你的装备和强化符文伤害提升?。

name: 强力护盾
effect: 当你获得护盾时，获得?适应之力，持续3秒。(5秒冷却时间)
effect_en: Gain 40 to 100 adaptive force for 3 seconds upon gaining a shield (5 second cooldown).

name: 由心及物
effect: 使你的最大生命值提升，数额相当于你一半的法力值。
effect_en: Grants bonus health equal to 50% maximum mana.

name: 山脉龙魂
effect: 你获得山脉龙魂，在脱离战斗之后获得一个持续一小段时间的护盾。

name: 海洋龙魂
effect: 获得【海洋龙魂】，在对敌方英雄造成伤害后提供高额的生命和法力回复。
effect_en: Grants the Ocean Dragon Soul, which has a modified base heal value of 100, or a different Dragon Soul if you aleady have it.

name: 吵闹鬼
effect: 获得【吵闹鬼】作为一个召唤师技能。吵闹鬼会同时施放召唤师技能【屏障】和【幽灵疾步】。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Poltergeist. Poltergeist: geteffect Poltergeist

name: 纯粹主义者 - 术师
effect: 获得百分比冷却缩减并将你的所有攻击速度转化为技能急速。
effect_en: Convert all of your bonus attack speed into ability haste at a rate of 0.65 ability haste per 1% bonus attack speed. Additionally, your abilities' total cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

name: 加固护盾
effect: 来自【?】技能的护盾变得更强并且受益于目标的已损失生命值。

name: 可靠武器
effect: 用【?】技能打击敌方英雄时会铸造一条友谊纽带。【?】技能基于你的友谊等级获得到临时提升伤害

name: 万用瞄准镜
effect: 获得?攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 75 bonus attack range.

name: 暗影疾奔
effect: 在使用一个冲刺、闪烁或传送类技能或离开潜行状态之后，获得移动速度。
effect_en: After dashing, blinking, or exiting stealth, gain 300 bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

name: 扇巴掌
effect: 每当你定身或缚地一个敌人时，获得10适应之力。阵亡时损失50%。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants you 10, stacking infinitely (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Lose 50% of stacks on death.

name: 下雪天
effect: 你的【雪球】获得100技能急速。在命中一名敌人时造成额外魔法伤害。如果你没有【雪球】，则获得一个【雪球】。

name: 坚若磐石
effect: 每当你定身或缚地一个敌人时，获得护甲和魔抗。

name: 天音爆
effect: 在为你的友军提供增益效果、治疗效果或护盾效果时，会对其附近的敌人们造成伤害和减速。
effect_en: Granting a buff, heal, or shield to your ally deals 30 to 150 true damage to enemies within 450 units of them and slows targets by 30% for 2 seconds (2 second cooldown).

name: 转得我眩晕了
effect: 将一个召唤师技能替换为骄行荡寇。骄行荡寇发射一根钩爪，吸附在地形上，在此之后，你可以再次施放来绕着它摆荡。在摆荡状态下，自动攻击相距最近的那个敌人。在与一个敌方英雄碰撞或再次施放时结束摆荡。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Heroic Swing Akshan (5.88 seconds after applying the 70 summoner spell haste from the global ARAM champion buff, starts post-effect). Heroic Swing - Active: You can activate Heroic Swing three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and you can use the third cast only after 0.5 seconds of the second cast. An attack or movement command may be inputted to use the second and third casts. First Cast: Fire a hook in the target direction that embeds in the first terrain hit for 2 seconds. Heroic Swing's second cast can be used while the hook is attached. If the hook fails to attach or you become immobilized, grounded, or polymorphed within the duration, Heroic Swing is cancelled and placed on full cooldown. Second Cast: Swing around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction based on the position of the cursor Dash will move clockwise if the player's cursor is anywhere to the left of their champion from their facing direction (or perspective), and counterclockwise if the cursor is anywhere to their champion's right., stopping upon colliding with an enemy champion or terrain. While swinging, fire at the nearest visible enemy within 500 units every 0.2 to deal them 15 to 75 (+ 15% AD) times (1 + 0.3 per 100% bonus attack speed) physical damage and apply on-hit effects for each shot, with on-hit damage reduced to 25% effectiveness. The dash will be interrupted if you are affected by any immobilizing or polymorphing crowd control during the dash. Third Cast: End the swing by jumping to the target location and fire one last shot at a nearby visible enemy. Scoring an enemy champion takedown reduces Heroic Swing's current cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

name: 旋转至胜
effect: 你的旋转类技能获得30技能急速并且多造成30%伤害。
effect_en: Your Any ability with 'spinning' properties deal 30% increased damage and have their cooldown reduced equivalent to 30 ability haste.

name: 叠角龙
effect: 在你获得一个技能、强化符文或装备的永久层数时，多获得100%！

name: 属性！
effect: 获得2个【属性锻造器】！
effect_en: Gain 2 Stat Bonus.

name: 保持坚定
effect: 当【?】技能对敌方英雄造成伤害时，获得?护甲和魔法抗性。

name: 主玩辅助
effect: 任务：治疗友方英雄?生命值。奖励：你提供的任何治疗效果现在还会在初始治疗之后提供持续治疗。

name: 快中求稳
effect: 在冲刺或闪烁后，获得护盾值。
effect_en: After dashing or blinking, gain a shield that lasts for 2 seconds and absorbs 65 to 290 (+ 65% AD) (+ 26% AP) damage (5 second cooldown).

name: 前进时间到
effect: 激活【?】技能会在其持续期间为你提供移动速度。

name: 质变：黄金阶
effect: 获得1个随机黄金阶强化符文。

name: 双生火焰
effect: 造成技能伤害时，发射1+?个飞弹，每个造成?魔法伤害。此外，获得15%暴击几率。
effect_en: Damaging abilities against enemy champions launch 1 (+ 1 per 33.33% critical strike chance) Firecrackers at the target that each deal 10 to 30 (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 7% AP) magic damage (5 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 15% critical strike chance.

name: 台风
effect: 你的攻击会对一个额外目标发射一个飞弹，从而造成削减过的伤害并施加攻击特效。
effect_en: Basic attacks launch a Firecracker at a nearby enemy champion that deals 30% AD physical damage and applies on-hit effects.

name: 终极不可阻挡
effect: 在你使用你的终极技能后，你获得持续3秒的控制免疫。 (8秒冷却时间)。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability grants you crowd control immunity for 3 seconds (8 second cooldown).

name: 升级：收集者
effect: 使用【收集者】的被动处决敌人时的处决阈值提升，并且提供额外金币。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades The Collector, empowering Death to have its execution threshold increased by 0.5% each time you kill an enemy champion, capped at a threshold of 12.5% of the target's maximum health, and Taxes to generate a further 25 gold (total 50 gold) from kills. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 升级：献祭
effect: 【璀璨回响】和【日炎圣盾】每当有目标受到【献祭】效果影响时，提供12 金币 。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades Bami's Cinder, Hollow Radiance, Sunfire Aegis, and Void Immolation, empowering Immolate to additionally grant you 12 gold per tick for each enemy champion afflicted by its effect. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 升级：中娅
effect: 【中娅沙漏】的冷却时间降低至45秒。你现在可以在【中娅沙漏】、【探索者的护臂】或【沃格勒特的巫师帽】凝滞状态持续期间移动并获得移动速度。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades Seeker's Armguard, Wooglet's Witchcap, and Zhonya's Hourglass, empowering Stasis to allow you to move during its active effect, during which time you also gain 50% bonus movement speed. Additionally, the cooldown of Zhonya's Hourglass Stasis is reduced to 45 seconds.

name: 防护面纱
effect: 每30秒获得一层法术护盾来格挡下一个敌方技能。

name: 巫师式思考
effect: 获得?法术强度。
effect_en: Grants 20 to 80 ability power.

name: 狂热者
effect: 获得?暴击几率和?攻击速度（随法术强度变化）。
